translations.fr: J'ai un besoin urgent de repos.
translations.yue: 我而家真係好需要休息。
translations.hi: मुझे तुरंत आराम की ज़रूरत है.
translations.da: Jeg har hårdt brug for hvile.
translations.ja: 今すぐ休む必要があります。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of the finite verb.
Finite main verb, present tense, 1st person singular; takes an accusative object.
Adverb modifying the verb phrase; indicates urgency/intensity.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object (accusative) of 'brauche'.

sentences.target: Wir fahren ans Meer zur Erholung.

translations.de: Wir fahren ans Meer zur Erholung.
translations.en: We’re going to the seaside to relax.
translations.es: Nos vamos a la playa para relajarnos.
translations.fr: On part à la mer pour se détendre.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi ra biển để thư giãn.
translations.nl: We gaan naar de kust om te ontspannen.
translations.hi: हम आराम करने के लिए समुद्र किनारे जा रहे हैं.
translations.el: Πάμε στη θάλασσα για να χαλαρώσουμε.
translations.nb: Vi drar til sjøen for å slappe av.
translations.id: Kami pergi ke pantai untuk bersantai.
translations.sv: Vi åker till havet för att koppla av.
translations.ro: Mergem la mare ca să ne relaxăm.
translations.da: Vi tager til havet for at slappe af.
translations.ja: 海へ行ってのんびりします。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person plural nominative; subject of the finite verb.
Finite main verb, present tense, 1st person plural; motion verb.
Contraction of preposition 'an' + definite article 'das'; marks direction; with motion it governs accusative.
Common noun, neuter singular; object of 'an' (via 'ans'), accusative due to motion.
Contraction of preposition 'zu' + definite article 'der' (feminine dative); introduces a purpose phrase and governs dative.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of 'zu' (dative), expressing purpose ('for recovery').

sentences.target: Nach der Prüfung gönne ich mir Erholung.
sentences.reading: /naːx deːɐ̯ ˈpʁyːfʊŋ ˈɡœnə ɪç miːɐ̯ ɛʁˈhoːlʊŋ/

translations.de: Nach der Prüfung gönne ich mir Erholung.
translations.ipa: /naːx deːɐ̯ ˈpʁyːfʊŋ ˈɡœnə ɪç miːɐ̯ ɛʁˈhoːlʊŋ/
translations.en: After the exam, I’m giving myself a break.
translations.es: Después del examen, me daré un respiro.
translations.fr: Après l'examen, je m'accorde une pause.
translations.it: Dopo l'esame, mi concedo un po' di riposo.
translations.zh-Hans: 考完试我就好好休息一下。
translations.yue: 考完試我要好好休息吓。
translations.pt: Depois da prova, vou me dar um descanso.
translations.he: אחרי המבחן אני אתן לעצמי לנוח.
translations.tr: Sınavdan sonra kendime bir mola vereceğim.
translations.vi: Sau kỳ thi, tôi sẽ tự thưởng cho mình một chút nghỉ ngơi.
translations.ar: بعد الامتحان سأمنح نفسي قسطًا من الراحة.
translations.nl: Na het examen gun ik mezelf wat rust.
translations.uk: Після іспиту я дозволю собі відпочити.
translations.hu: A vizsga után megjutalmazom magam egy kis pihenéssel.
translations.hi: परीक्षा के बाद मैं खुद को थोड़ा आराम दूँगा.
translations.pl: Po egzaminie zafunduję sobie trochę odpoczynku.
translations.el: Μετά την εξέταση θα χαρίσω στον εαυτό μου λίγη ξεκούραση.
translations.nb: Etter eksamen skal jeg unne meg litt hvile.
translations.id: Setelah ujian, saya akan memberi diri sendiri waktu untuk istirahat.
translations.sv: Efter provet ska jag unna mig lite vila.
translations.ro: După examen, îmi voi oferi o pauză.
translations.da: Efter eksamen giver jeg mig selv en pause.
translations.ja: 試験が終わったら、ゆっくり休むつもりです。

tokens.explanation: Preposition governing dative; temporal meaning 'after'.
Definite article, feminine dative singular; agrees with 'Prüfung'.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of 'nach' (dative).
Finite main verb, present tense, 1st person singular; ditransitive with dative recipient and accusative theme.
Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject.
Personal pronoun, 1st person singular dative; indirect object/recipient.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object (accusative) of 'gönne'.

translations.fr: Aujourd'hui, le repos me fait du bien.
translations.ru: Сегодня мне пойдёт на пользу отдых.
translations.vi: Hôm nay nghỉ ngơi sẽ tốt cho tôi.
translations.uk: Сьогодні мені піде на користь відпочинок.
translations.hu: Ma jót tesz nekem a pihenés.
translations.hi: आज आराम करना मेरे लिए अच्छा रहेगा.
translations.el: Σήμερα θα μου κάνει καλό να ξεκουραστώ.
translations.nb: I dag har jeg godt av å hvile.
translations.id: Hari ini, istirahat akan baik buat saya.
translations.sv: I dag mår jag bra av att vila.
translations.ro: Astăzi îmi prinde bine să mă odihnesc.
translations.da: I dag har jeg godt af å hvile.
translations.ja: 今日は休むのがいいです。

tokens.explanation: Temporal adverb setting the time frame.
Finite main verb, present tense, 3rd person singular; used in the fixed expression 'jdm. tut etw. gut' ('something is good for someone').
Personal pronoun, 1st person singular dative; experiencer/beneficiary.
Common noun, feminine singular; grammatical subject (nominative) of 'tut'.
Predicative adjective complement in the expression 'gut tun'.

en: We’re going to the seaside to relax.
After the exam, I’m giving myself a break.
